First Presence
No detection event. No approach vector. Object was present at coordinates 0.000 at time of first measurement.

ENTRY 02 // ——.——.——
Material Absence
Spectrographic analysis returns no composition. Object occupies volume and has mass. No material accounts for these properties.

ENTRY 03 // ——.——.——
Subsonic Field
17.2 Hz continuous. Correlates with spatial disorientation and involuntary memory access. No source identified.
FREQ: 17.2 HzSOURCE: —
ENTRY 04 // ——.——.——
Temporal Drift
Object does not age. Degradation rate: zero. Internal structure reorients in response to observation.

CRYPT // WHITE ABYSS ARCHIVE // EST. ——.——.——
The Archive
A repository of observations without resolution. Every entry documents what was witnessed. Nothing here explains what it means.
The Object
Designation Ω was assigned at first contact. The designation carries no meaning. It was the last letter available.
The Record
You have reached the interior of the archive. What you see here is what remains after everything explicable has been removed.
